description: xmuse V6 chat-memory taxonomy — scope-to-category mapping

conversation_shared.description: Shared group-chat context that all participants can reference

blueprint_decision.description: Mission/planning decisions and the rationale behind them

participant.description: Per-participant long-term memory, preferences, and history

unresolved_thread.description: Dangling threads needing recall or resolution

cross_restart_recall.description: Context needed to recover after runner restart

design_rationale.separate_participant_scope: Participant memory is isolated from shared conversation memory to support per-participant long-term preferences
design_rationale.unresolved_thread_as_first_class: Threads that aren't resolved need explicit recall treatment, not implicit conversation summary
design_rationale.cross_restart_recall_as_scope: Recovery context after restart is a different memory need than active shared memory
design_rationale.session_boundary_shared: Session boundary category appears in both conversation_shared and cross_restart_recall to bridge active and recovery views
